notable_other: (C) denotes the Chairperson of each Board Committee.

The section lists nine Board Committees: Audit Committee, Board Governance Remuneration & Nomination Committee, Corporate Social Responsibility Committee, Credit Committee, Customer Service Committee, Fraud Monitoring Committee, Information Technology Strategy Committee, Risk Committee, and Stakeholders Relationship Committee.
Key Personnel listed are the Group CFO (Anindya Banerjee) and Company Secretary (Prachiti Lalingkar), distinct from Board Members.

summary: This section presents the Corporate Information page of ICICI Bank's annual report, detailing the full composition of the Board of Directors and its committees. A key leadership transition is recorded: Girish Chandra Chaturvedi served as Non-Executive (part-time) Chairman up to June 30, 2024, and was succeeded by Pradeep Kumar Sinha, who assumed the role effective July 1, 2024. The Board comprises seven Independent Directors, one Managing Director & CEO (Sandeep Bakhshi), and three Executive Directors (Sandeep Batra, Rakesh Jha, and Ajay Kumar Gupta). Rohit Bhasin was newly appointed as an Independent Director effective July 26, 2024. The section details the composition of nine Board Committees — including the Audit Committee, Risk Committee, Credit Committee, and others — as of July 27, 2024, with each committee's Chairperson identified. Two Key Personnel are also listed: Anindya Banerjee as Group Chief Financial Officer and Prachiti Lalingkar as Company Secretary.
